a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Estimated number of suicides per 100,000 people in a given population and year. Suicide deaths are underreported in
many countries due to social stigma and cultural or legal concerns. This data includes modeling based on global
suicide patterns, and includes adjustments and extrapolations that aim to account for missing data and underreporting.
Note: To allow for comparisons between countries and over time, this metric is age-standardized.
